summary: Completed testing of order status management and WhatsApp buy button features. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend WhatsApp integration working. Admin UI testing blocked by authentication issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Admin login not persisting properly, preventing access to admin panel

integration_issues.issue: Cannot access admin panel after login to test order status management UI

passed_tests: Order status validation (rejects invalid status values)
Admin-only access control for order status updates
WhatsApp buy button on product detail pages
WhatsApp button links to correct number (9779811761679)
WhatsApp message includes product details and pricing
Homepage loads with all products and categories

success_percentage.frontend: 70% (WhatsApp integration working, admin UI blocked by auth)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin authentication persistence issue preventing access to admin panel. Admin login appears successful but session not maintained for admin panel access.
